context.notes: These questions assume the seeded fixture created by tests/fixtures/mcp/seed_fixture.py.

case.question: How many guilds are stored in the fixture?
What prefix is configured for the fixture guild?
Which welcome message is stored for the fixture guild?
case.expected: Welcome to LOKI THE SUN GOD HQ!

case.question: What is the configured star threshold?
How many sticky entries exist in the fixture?
Which AI doc mentions Ollama direct mode?
What local URL is stored as the Anthropic base URL in the fixture Codex settings?
Should diagnostics report a runtime log as present in the seeded fixture?
What stream platform entries are stored in the fixture?
Does the fixture require DISCORD_TOKEN for saved guild config retrieval?
